tasks.subject: Task 1: Move FpsControls.ts into graphCommon/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Identity move of FpsControls.ts from lib/graph/ to lib/desktop/graphCommon/, fix the one import in /desktop/graph route, manually verify pointer-lock + WASD + Shift sprint behavior unchanged.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/desktop/graphCommon/FpsControls.ts
- Delete: app/src/lib/graph/FpsControls.ts
- Modify: app/src/routes/desktop/graph/+page.svelte:7

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/desktop/graphCommon/FpsControls.ts","app/src/lib/graph/FpsControls.ts","app/src/routes/desktop/graph/+page.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["FpsControls.ts no longer in lib/graph/","Identical content in lib/desktop/graphCommon/","npm run check passes","Manual: pointer lock + WASD + Shift unchanged on /desktop/graph"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extract label LOD into graphCommon/labelLod.ts
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/desktop/graphCommon/labelLod.ts","app/tests/unit/desktop/graphCommon/labelLod.test.ts","app/src/routes/desktop/graph/+page.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- labelLod","acceptanceCriteria":["updateLabelOpacity exported and pure","4 tests pass","Hubs untouched","Manual: label fade unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Codegraph types + loadCodegraphData loader

**Goal:** Define types + LoadResult discriminated union and implement loadCodegraphData() with parallel fetch and degree/size computation.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/codegraph/codegraphTypes.ts","app/src/lib/codegraph/loadCodegraphData.ts","app/tests/unit/codegraph/loadCodegraphData.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- loadCodegraphData","acceptanceCriteria":["Types match spec lines 153-191","8 tests pass","Hyperedges dropped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: nodeColor.ts (golden-angle hue per community)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** nodeColor(community) returns hsl((community * 137.5) % 360, 60%, 55%).

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/codegraph/nodeColor.ts","app/tests/unit/codegraph/nodeColor.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- nodeColor","acceptanceCriteria":["Deterministic","60% sat, 55% lightness","Hue diff between 0 and 1 >= 30 deg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: sync-codegraph.mjs script + npm entry + .gitignore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dev-only Node script. NOTE: spec says regex ^### Community (\d+): (.+)$ but actual GRAPH_REPORT.md uses dash + quoted form. Implements both.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/scripts/sync-codegraph.mjs","app/tests/unit/scripts/sync-codegraph.test.ts","app/package.json",".gitignore"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- sync-codegraph","acceptanceCriteria":["Friendly error + exit 1 when missing","Korean error string matches spec","3 JSON files emitted","Both header forms parsed"]}
```
